subject: Research Scientist role on multimodal reasoning
body_text: We are selectively hiring for a Research Scientist role focused on multimodal reasoning and foundation models. Would you be open to a conversation this week?

subject: Invite-only dinner for deep-tech founders and senior ML engineers
body_text: We are hosting an invite-only founder dinner in Bengaluru with deep-tech operators, investors, and senior ML engineers building applied AI companies.

subject: Free trial for growth hack webinar series
body_text: Join our webinar and free trial to accelerate your sales funnel. Unsubscribe anytime.

subject: Selective alumni research and startup meetup next week
body_text: A small alumni meetup is being organized for researchers, operators, and founders. We would value your presence and a short introduction to your current work.

subject: Need to speak today about something important
body_text: Long time. This is personal and important. Please call me today if you can.
